title: Presentation Semantics Registry Schema
description: Canonical JSON schema for AD-007 presentation semantics authored at world compile time. Defines how abilities and events BEHAVE VISUALLY in this world. Content-independent — same mechanical template can have different presentation semantics in different worlds.

PresentationSemanticsRegistry.title: PresentationSemanticsRegistry
PresentationSemanticsRegistry.description: Top-level registry of all AD-007 Layer B presentation semantics for this world. Every ability and event category in the content pack has a corresponding entry. Sorted by content_id for deterministic serialization.

schema_version.description: Schema version of this registry file (major.minor)

world_id.description: World identity hash — must match world_manifest.json world_id

compiler_version.description: Version of the world compiler that produced this registry

event_entry_count.description: Total number of event category entries

ability_entries.description: Presentation semantics for all abilities, sorted by content_id

event_entries.description: Default presentation semantics for event categories (combat, environmental, social), sorted by event_category

AbilityPresentationEntry.title: AbilityPresentationEntry
AbilityPresentationEntry.description: AD-007 Layer B presentation semantics for a single ability. These structured tags tell Spark how to narrate, the battle map how to animate, and the discovery log what to progressively reveal. Frozen at compile time.

content_id.description: Content pack identifier (e.g., 'spell.fireball'). Must have a matching entry in the vocabulary registry.

delivery_mode.description: How the effect reaches its target. Primary staging driver for animation and narration.

staging.description: Temporal sequence of the effect. Constrains Spark narration order.

vfx_tags.description: Visual descriptor tags. Sorted alphabetically. Drive battle map overlays and Spark imagery. (e.g., ['expanding_ring', 'fire', 'scorch'])

sfx_tags.description: Audio descriptor tags. Sorted alphabetically. Drive audio cues and Spark sound descriptions. (e.g., ['boom', 'crackle'])

scale.description: Perceived size/impact of the effect. Drives Spark emphasis and VFX intensity.

residue.description: What remains after the effect resolves. Sorted alphabetically. (e.g., ['heated_air', 'scorch_marks', 'smoke'])

ui_description.description: Canonical short description for the world's rulebook entry. Generated from Layer A + Layer B at compile time. Frozen.

token_style.description: Battle map token overlay style (e.g., 'fire_circle', 'frost_zone'). Null if no persistent token.

handout_style.description: How this ability appears in player handouts/notebooks (e.g., 'bordered_red', 'glowing_text'). Null for default.

contraindications.description: Narration patterns that MUST NOT appear for this ability. Used by ContradictionChecker. (e.g., for a projectile: 'erupting_from_ground' would be a contraindication)

EventPresentationEntry.title: EventPresentationEntry
EventPresentationEntry.description: Default presentation semantics for an event category. Applies to events that don't have ability-specific semantics (e.g., generic melee hit, environmental damage, social interaction).

default_scale.description: Default scale for events in this category

default_vfx_tags.description: Default visual tags for this event category

default_sfx_tags.description: Default audio tags for this event category

default_residue.description: Default residue for this event category

narration_priority.description: How eagerly Spark should narrate this event type

SemanticsProvenance.title: SemanticsProvenance
SemanticsProvenance.description: Provenance record for a presentation semantics entry.

compiler_version.description: Version of the compiler that generated this entry

seed_used.description: The derived seed used for this entry's generation

content_pack_id.description: Content pack that provided the behavioral contract (Layer A)

template_ids.description: IDs of theme templates used to generate semantics

llm_output_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the LLM output used for tag generation. Null if deterministic (non-LLM) generation.

description: This schema defines the Presentation Semantics Registry: AD-007 Layer B structured tags for every ability and event category in the world. These tags constrain Spark narration, drive battle map visuals, and enable the world-owned rulebook. Frozen at world compile time. Different worlds may assign different semantics to the same mechanical template.
